properties.combined_effect: Red's attempt to engage Blue's operational reserves was met with effective Blue countermeasures. Blue's F-16s intercepted Red ISR UAVs, reducing their effectiveness. Red's kamikaze UAVs faced strong Blue UAV defenses, resulting in limited impact on Blue's radar installations. Red's SOF raid was partially successful, but Blue maintained C2 integrity. Red's naval gunfire support was countered by Blue's corvettes, maintaining Blue's maritime defense. Red's inland advance was halted by Blue's mobile defense, exploiting Red's culmination.

properties.name_ar: قيادة المنطقة الجنوبية. (الفيلق الأول) وتشكل القيادة العملياتية

properties.action_what: Advance inland to engage Blue's reserve forces at the phase line.
properties.action_why: Maintain operational tempo and engage Blue's reserves before they can consolidate.
properties.action_intended_effect: Prevent Blue from effectively counterattacking by engaging their reserves.
properties.cause_what: Red advance halted by Blue mobile defense

properties.action_what: Deploy 4 destroyers to provide naval gunfire support and counter Blue's corvette threat.
properties.action_why: Utilize available naval assets to support ground operations and counter Blue's maritime threats.
properties.action_intended_effect: Suppress Blue's coastal defenses and corvette operations.
properties.cause_what: Naval gunfire support countered by corvettes

properties.action_what: Deploy ISR UAVs to locate and identify Blue's reserve positions and air defenses.
properties.action_why: Enhance situational awareness and target acquisition for subsequent strikes.
properties.action_intended_effect: Identify Blue's reserve positions for targeted strikes.
properties.cause_what: F-16 squadron intercepts ISR UAVs

properties.action_what: Launch kamikaze UAVs to target Blue's coastal radar installations.
properties.action_why: Disrupt Blue's coastal surveillance and targeting capabilities.
properties.action_intended_effect: Degrade Blue's radar coverage and targeting accuracy.
properties.cause_what: Kamikaze UAVs intercepted by Blue UAVs

properties.cause_what: SOF raid partially disrupted by Blue C2 defense

properties.action_what: Held in reserve — preserving SSM magazine for H-hour saturation salvo per opening-day concentration doctrine.
properties.action_why: Preserve strategic strike capability for decisive engagement at culmination.
properties.action_intended_effect: Maintain strategic strike capability for future decisive phases.

properties.name_ar: فرقة المشاة الآلية 2. تؤمن الحماية للقواعد والاهداف الحيوية
العمل الممكن رقم 1. الهجوم على blue team لاحتلال الهدف X على ثلاث مراحل وكما يلي:
المرحلة الأولى. ابرار عناصر الاستطلاع والتأمين والمقدمة لتأمين نقاط الابرار وبعمق 1 – 2 كم

المرحلة الثانية. اقتحام الدفاعات الرئيسة والاستيلاء على مناطق الابرار وتوسيع رأس الشاطئ بفرقة المشاة الرابعة الى عمق (8 - 10) كم مع تطوير الهجوم بالقوة اللاحقة فرقة المشاة  الآلية 9  الى عمق العدو باتجاه الجنوب للاستيلاء على خط حيوي الى عمق (40 – 50) كم
